meta.title: Pub Quiz in Calgary | Mixler
meta.description: Join a pub quiz night in Calgary. Team up, answer questions across fun categories, and compete for prizes. Great for groups, date nights, and solo players.

content.subtitle: Grab a drink, form a team, and put your knowledge to work.
content.intro: Pub quiz nights in Calgary are a staple of the city's social scene for good reason. The combination of competitive trivia, a relaxed pub environment, and a good host adds up to one of the most consistently enjoyable evenings out. Whether you come with a group or fly solo, it's easy to get into it and even easier to want to come back.

what_to_expect.heading: Pub setting with drinks
what_to_expect.body: Pub quiz happens in a bar. Drinks are part of the experience, and the atmosphere is exactly what you'd hope for.

what_to_expect.heading: Written answer rounds
what_to_expect.body: Teams write their answers on paper or a submission sheet. No shouting out, which keeps the energy focused.

what_to_expect.heading: Varied categories every round
what_to_expect.body: General knowledge, sports, music, film, and current events all feature. Different rounds let different people shine.

what_to_expect.heading: Leaderboard and prizes
what_to_expect.body: Scores are tallied and announced between rounds, keeping tension high until the final reveal.

tips: Pub quiz rewards range over depth. A team of six generalists usually beats a team of two experts.
Don't discuss your answers too loudly. Other teams are listening.
Calgary pub quiz nights often have a loyal regular crowd. Show up a few weeks running and you'll quickly feel like a regular too.
Team names matter. Hosts read them out loud, and a good one gets the room laughing before you've answered a single question.
Mixler lists pub quiz events in Calgary when we schedule them. Join the waitlist and we'll reach out when one is added.
content.waitlist_heading: Want to know when we run pub quiz events?
content.waitlist_body: Join the waitlist and we'll email you when we add one. We use this to plan what to run next.

faq.q: How is pub quiz different from trivia night?
faq.a: Pub quiz always happens in a bar and uses written answers. Trivia nights can happen in various venues and sometimes use other formats.

faq.q: Can I join without a full team?
faq.a: Yes. Solo and small group players are usually welcome to fill open spots on other teams.
Most events cap teams at 6. The sweet spot is 4 to 6 people covering different knowledge areas.

faq.q: Is there a cost to enter?
faq.a: Some events are free, others charge a small entry fee. Check the event listing for details.
